{{Quote|I am an ethical Jedi, I only twist people's minds in the line of duty.|Thann Mithric|<ref name="Betrayal" />}}
'''Thann Mithric''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] who served as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] in the time following the resolution of the [[Swarm War]]. At the beginning of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] he was constantly chastised by [[Kolir Hu'lya]] for using his Falleen [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromones]] along with [[Mind trick/Legends|Jedi mind tricks]]. He served as part of the team, along with [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Zekk]], and Hu'lya that attempted to kidnap [[Aidel Saxan]] as part of [[Operation Roundabout]]. However, it turned out to be a trap and Zekk received burns on his back while Kolir suffered a broken jaw. Thann was not injured badly.<ref name="Betrayal" />

Thann accompanied [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyle Katarn]], fellow Jedi Knights [[Kolir Hu'lya]] and [[Valin Horn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi apprentice]] [[Seha Dorvald]] on a [[Undercity Ambush|mission]] in the underlevels of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to seek out [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], now ''[[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Caedus.'' During the [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] between the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and Caedus, Kyle was severely wounded by a [[Shiak|stab]] he received in the chest and was taken to safety by Seha. Kolir, Valin and Thann carried on fighting Caedus, which resulted in Thann taking a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] wound to the chest and [[Sai cha/Legends|his decapitation]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:FalleenNEGAS.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A possible depiction of Thann Mithric.]]
According to [[Leland Chee]], it is possible that the Falleen pictured in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' is Mithric.<ref name="SWB">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=222689&start=4110#16279017|thread=Welcome some BCaT VIPs|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2007-02-08|time=12:19 PM}}</ref>
